name: Penette in Padella
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried mushrooms for at least half an hour. Squeeze out most of the liquid and set aside.
2. Chop the mushrooms into small pieces. Keep 1/2 cup of the water from cooking the mushrooms.
3. In a large skillet, add about 3 tablespoons olive oil over medium heat. Add the dry penette pasta and toasty until they darken for about 8 minutes, stirring frequently to avoid burning.
4. Add brandy and continue stirring until all the alcohol evaporates. Remove from heat and set aside.
5. In another skillet, add 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat. Add the mushrooms and parsley, sautéing occasionally for about 3 minutes.
6. Add heavy cream and stir well. Then add the grated Parmesan cheese and stir until you achieve a smooth paste. Remove from heat.
7. Return the penette pasta to medium heat. Add broth and mushroom water. Cover and cook for about 10 minutes until al dente.
8. Uncover and let most of the liquid boil off. Stir in the mushroom mixture and cook for about 1 minute.
